$comment: GENERATED by contracts/codegen/generate.py from hardware_unit.schema.yaml - DO NOT EDIT.
description: A physical device with a lifecycle (camera/fob/sd/gripper) — current-state view (CONTRACT §3.1).

board.description: Board type (fobs, e.g. esp32-cyd; the per-fob profile, with provisioning.firmware_version).

body_serial.description: Immutable body serial (provenance/crosswalk; §3.4; null until provisioned).

camera_id.description: LOGICAL camera identity (registry-allocated, globally unique, unchanging, retire-not-reuse). The body_serial↔camera_id crosswalk; cameras only (null otherwise).

fob_id.description: Logical fob identity (fobs only; matches sidecar provenance.fob_id).

insv_serial.description: The IAQEB .insv serial — the §3.4 crosswalk key; immutable; NEVER decides the kit (§3.3).

kit_id.description: Current kit binding (as-of; the binding history lives in events, OQ-4). Serials NEVER decide this (§3.3).

mount.description: Mount config (cameras) — promoted from sidecar-only into the per-unit registry profile.

provisioning.description: Provisioning/connection facts captured at provision time (R-2). ONE nesting level.

wifi_ssid.description: Camera/AP WiFi SSID (identity-only; never the PSK — fleet_registry secrets-separation).

side.description: Camera side (NAND-burned; domain-closed enum). OMITTED for non-cameras (absent, not null — a nullable enum would reject null structurally).

status.description: Lifecycle state — OPEN string, WARN-checked vs {received, provisioned, deployed, faulted, retired} (OQ-A).

type.description: Device type — OPEN string (hard-present), WARN-checked vs {fob, camera, sd, gripper} (OQ-A).

title: HardwareUnit
